tasks.instruction: Using national monthly unemployment data, create a line chart of the national unemployment rate from January 2020 through December 2023 and add it to your default dashboard.

tasks.instruction: From state-level median household income data, filter to the year 2022 and the two states California and Texas, then download the resulting table view as a CSV file.

target_names: Median Household Income by State, Annual
